    The plain-text reason set by a person or system explaining why the restriction was removed If the restriction is active, the reason will not be set.

    endedReason(Optional<String> endedReason)
    The plain-text reason set by a person or system explaining why the restriction was removed If the restriction is active, the reason will not be set.
    Restriction.Builder
    endedTime(OffsetDateTime endedTime)
    The datetime of a restriction's removal from an account If the restriction is active, the ended time will not be set.
    Restriction.Builder
    endedTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> endedTime)
    The datetime of a restriction's removal from an account If the restriction is active, the ended time will not be set.
    Restriction.Builder
    endedUserId(String endedUserId)
    The user attributed to the restriction's removal from the account; typically expressed as an Auth user ID If the restriction is active, the user will not be set.
    Restriction.Builder
    endedUserId(Optional<String> endedUserId)
    The user attributed to the restriction's removal from the account; typically expressed as an Auth user ID If the restriction is active, the user will not be set.
    Restriction.Builder
    restrictionCode(String restrictionCode)
    A enumerated value indicating the nature of a restriction; prefixed by the concerned department (e.g., `MARGIN_CALL_VIOLATION_REG_T`); suspends related entitlements of the account until it is removed; most codes are administrated by the custodian but some are available for use by the integrator
    Restriction.Builder
    restrictionCode(Optional<String> restrictionCode)
    A enumerated value indicating the nature of a restriction; prefixed by the concerned department (e.g., `MARGIN_CALL_VIOLATION_REG_T`); suspends related entitlements of the account until it is removed; most codes are administrated by the custodian but some are available for use by the integrator

      public Restriction.Builder endedReason(String endedReason)
      The plain-text reason set by a person or system explaining why the restriction was removed If the restriction is active, the reason will not be set.

      The datetime of a restriction's removal from an account If the restriction is active, the ended time will not be set.

      public Restriction.Builder endedTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> endedTime)
      The datetime of a restriction's removal from an account If the restriction is active, the ended time will not be set.

    • endedUserId

      public Restriction.Builder endedUserId(String endedUserId)
      The user attributed to the restriction's removal from the account; typically expressed as an Auth user ID If the restriction is active, the user will not be set.

    • endedUserId

      public Restriction.Builder endedUserId(Optional<String> endedUserId)
      The user attributed to the restriction's removal from the account; typically expressed as an Auth user ID If the restriction is active, the user will not be set.

    • restrictionCode

      public Restriction.Builder restrictionCode(String restrictionCode)
      A enumerated value indicating the nature of a restriction; prefixed by the concerned department (e.g., `MARGIN_CALL_VIOLATION_REG_T`); suspends related entitlements of the account until it is removed; most codes are administrated by the custodian but some are available for use by the integrator

    • restrictionCode

      public Restriction.Builder restrictionCode(Optional<String> restrictionCode)
      A enumerated value indicating the nature of a restriction; prefixed by the concerned department (e.g., `MARGIN_CALL_VIOLATION_REG_T`); suspends related entitlements of the account until it is removed; most codes are administrated by the custodian but some are available for use by the integrator
